    Index

    A B C D G H I M N P R S T U V 
    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Serialized Form

    A

    addEdge(Node) - Method in class configs.Node
    Adds an outgoing edge from this node to the supplied destination.
    addPublisher(Agent) - Method in class graph.Topic
    Registers an agent as a publisher of this topic.
    addServlet(String, String, Servlet) - Method in interface server.HTTPServer
    Registers a servlet for the given HTTP method and URI prefix.
    addServlet(String, String, Servlet) - Method in class server.MyHTTPServer
    Registers a servlet for a specific HTTP method and URI prefix.
    Agent - Interface in graph
    Describes an executable graph component that can consume topic messages, publish results, and participate in the project runtime.
    AGENT - Enum constant in enum class configs.Node.Kind
    An agent node in the runtime graph.
    asDouble - Variable in class graph.Message
    The payload interpreted as a numeric value, or Double.NaN when parsing fails.
    asText - Variable in class graph.Message
    The payload interpreted as text.

    B

    BinOpAgent - Class in configs
    Configuration-layer binary-operation agent that subscribes to two input topics, applies a numeric operation, and publishes the result to an output topic.
    BinOpAgent - Class in graph
    Reusable agent that combines two numeric input topics with a binary operation and publishes the computed result to an output topic.
    BinOpAgent(String, String, String, String, BinaryOperator<Double>) - Constructor for class configs.BinOpAgent
    Creates a binary-operation agent and registers it with the relevant topics.
    BinOpAgent(String, String, String, String, BinaryOperator<Double>) - Constructor for class graph.BinOpAgent
    Creates a binary-operation agent and registers it with the relevant topics.

    C

    callback(String, Message) - Method in class configs.BinOpAgent
    Updates the matching input value and publishes a result when both inputs contain valid numeric messages.
    callback(String, Message) - Method in class configs.IncAgent
    Increments a numeric input message and publishes the result.
    callback(String, Message) - Method in class configs.PlusAgent
    Updates one of the cached inputs and publishes the current sum.
    callback(String, Message) - Method in interface graph.Agent
    Invokes the agent in response to a published topic message.
    callback(String, Message) - Method in class graph.BinOpAgent
    Updates the matching input value and publishes a result when both inputs contain valid numeric messages.
    callback(String, Message) - Method in class graph.ParallelAgent
    Queues a callback for asynchronous processing by the worker thread.
    clear() - Method in class graph.TopicManagerSingleton.TopicManager
    Removes all topics from the registry.
    close() - Method in class configs.BinOpAgent
    Unsubscribes the agent from its input topics and removes its publisher registration from the output topic.
    close() - Method in interface configs.Config
    Closes the configuration and releases its runtime resources.
    close() - Method in class configs.GenericConfig
    Closes every created parallel agent and clears the managed runtime state.
    close() - Method in class configs.IncAgent
    Closes the agent.
    close() - Method in class configs.MathExampleConfig
    Closes the configuration.
    close() - Method in class configs.PlusAgent
    Closes the agent.
    close() - Method in interface graph.Agent
    Releases any resources held by the agent.
    close() - Method in class graph.BinOpAgent
    Unsubscribes the agent from its input topics and removes its publisher registration from the output topic.
    close() - Method in class graph.ParallelAgent
    Stops the worker thread and closes the wrapped agent.
    close() - Method in interface server.HTTPServer
    Stops the server and releases any resources held by the implementation.
    close() - Method in class server.MyHTTPServer
    Stops the server, closes the listening socket, shuts down the worker pool, and closes each registered servlet once.
    close() - Method in class servlets.ConfLoader
    Closes the currently active configuration and releases its resources.
    close() - Method in class servlets.GraphRefresh
    Closes the servlet.
    close() - Method in class servlets.HtmlLoader
    Closes the servlet.
    close() - Method in interface servlets.Servlet
    Releases any resources owned by the servlet.
    close() - Method in class servlets.TopicDisplayer
    Closes the servlet.
    Config - Interface in configs
    Defines the lifecycle of a reusable runtime configuration.
    configs - package configs
     
    ConfLoader - Class in servlets
    Accepts uploaded configuration files, recreates the runtime graph from the uploaded definition, and returns the rendered graph view.
    ConfLoader() - Constructor for class servlets.ConfLoader
    Creates a configuration upload servlet that stores uploaded files under the project's upload directory.
    create() - Method in interface configs.Config
    Creates and initializes the runtime objects described by the configuration.
    create() - Method in class configs.GenericConfig
    Reads the configured file, instantiates the declared agents, and wraps them in ParallelAgent executors.
    create() - Method in class configs.MathExampleConfig
    Instantiates the example agents used by this configuration.
    createFromTopics() - Method in class configs.Graph
    Rebuilds the graph from the topics currently registered in the TopicManagerSingleton singleton.

    D

    data - Variable in class graph.Message
    The immutable raw payload bytes.
    date - Variable in class graph.Message
    The creation timestamp of the message.

    G

    GenericConfig - Class in configs
    Generic configuration loader that creates agents from a plain-text configuration file by using reflection.
    GenericConfig() - Constructor for class configs.GenericConfig
    Creates an empty generic configuration loader.
    get() - Static method in class graph.TopicManagerSingleton
    Returns the singleton topic manager instance.
    getContent() - Method in class server.RequestParser.RequestInfo
    Returns the parsed request body content.
    getDisplayName() - Method in class configs.Node
    Returns the display label for the node.
    getEdges() - Method in class configs.Node
    Returns the outgoing edges of this node.
    getGraph() - Static method in class servlets.GraphState
    Returns the currently stored graph snapshot.
    getGraphHTML(Graph) - Static method in class views.HtmlGraphWriter
    Converts a graph into HTML lines based on the project's graph template.
    getHeaders() - Method in class server.RequestParser.RequestInfo
    Returns the parsed request headers.
    getHttpCommand() - Method in class server.RequestParser.RequestInfo
    Returns the parsed HTTP method.
    getKind() - Method in class configs.Node
    Returns the node kind.
    getLastMessage() - Method in class graph.Topic
    Returns the most recently published message for this topic.
    getMessage() - Method in class configs.Node
    Returns the message associated with this node, if any.
    getName() - Method in class configs.BinOpAgent
    Returns the display name of the agent.
    getName() - Method in interface configs.Config
    Returns the configuration name.
    getName() - Method in class configs.GenericConfig
    Returns the name of this configuration implementation.
    getName() - Method in class configs.IncAgent
    Returns the display name of the agent.
    getName() - Method in class configs.MathExampleConfig
    Returns the name of this example configuration.
    getName() - Method in class configs.Node
    Returns the internal node name.
    getName() - Method in class configs.PlusAgent
    Returns the display name of the agent.
    getName() - Method in interface graph.Agent
    Returns the agent name used for display and graph construction.
    getName() - Method in class graph.BinOpAgent
    Returns the display name of the agent.
    getName() - Method in class graph.ParallelAgent
    Returns the wrapped agent's name.
    getParameters() - Method in class server.RequestParser.RequestInfo
    Returns the parsed request parameters.
    getTopic(String) - Method in class graph.TopicManagerSingleton.TopicManager
    Returns the topic with the supplied name, creating it if necessary.
    getTopics() - Method in class graph.TopicManagerSingleton.TopicManager
    Returns all currently known topics.
    getUri() - Method in class server.RequestParser.RequestInfo
    Returns the original request URI.
    getUriSegments() - Method in class server.RequestParser.RequestInfo
    Returns the non-empty path segments derived from the URI.
    getVersion() - Method in interface configs.Config
    Returns the configuration version.
    getVersion() - Method in class configs.GenericConfig
    Returns the version number of this configuration implementation.
    getVersion() - Method in class configs.MathExampleConfig
    Returns the version of this example configuration.
    graph - package graph
     
    Graph - Class in configs
    In-memory directed graph representation of the project's runtime topology.
    Graph() - Constructor for class configs.Graph
    Creates an empty runtime graph.
    GraphRefresh - Class in servlets
    Returns the latest rendered graph view for the currently deployed configuration.
    GraphRefresh() - Constructor for class servlets.GraphRefresh
    Creates a graph refresh servlet.
    GraphState - Class in servlets
    Stores the currently active graph snapshot shared by graph-related servlets.
    GraphState() - Constructor for class servlets.GraphState
    Creates a graph state holder.

    H

    handle(RequestParser.RequestInfo, OutputStream) - Method in class servlets.ConfLoader
    Processes a multipart configuration upload, rebuilds the active graph, preserves existing topic values when possible, and writes the generated graph HTML back to the client.
    handle(RequestParser.RequestInfo, OutputStream) - Method in class servlets.GraphRefresh
    Renders the current graph state as HTML, or a fallback page when no graph has been loaded yet.
    handle(RequestParser.RequestInfo, OutputStream) - Method in class servlets.HtmlLoader
    Resolves the requested application path, loads the matching file if it exists, and writes an HTTP response to the client.
    handle(RequestParser.RequestInfo, OutputStream) - Method in interface servlets.Servlet
    Handles a single HTTP request and writes the response to the client stream.
    handle(RequestParser.RequestInfo, OutputStream) - Method in class servlets.TopicDisplayer
    Optionally publishes a message to a topic and then renders the current topic state as an HTML table.
    hasCycles() - Method in class configs.Graph
    Determines whether any node in the graph participates in a cycle.
    hasCycles() - Method in class configs.Node
    Determines whether this node participates in a directed cycle.
    HtmlGraphWriter - Class in views
    Generates the HTML and SVG markup used to render the runtime graph.
    HtmlGraphWriter() - Constructor for class views.HtmlGraphWriter
    Creates an HTML graph writer.
    HtmlLoader - Class in servlets
    Serves static HTML files from a configured application directory.
    HtmlLoader(String) - Constructor for class servlets.HtmlLoader
    Creates a servlet that serves files from the provided HTML root directory.
    HTTPServer - Interface in server
    Defines the reusable contract for a lightweight HTTP server that dispatches incoming requests to registered Servlet handlers.

    I

    IncAgent - Class in configs
    Sample agent that increments incoming numeric messages and publishes the result to its configured output topic.
    IncAgent(String[], String[]) - Constructor for class configs.IncAgent
    Creates an increment agent and subscribes it to its single input topic.

    M

    MathExampleConfig - Class in configs
    Example configuration that creates a small arithmetic processing graph for demonstration and testing purposes.
    MathExampleConfig() - Constructor for class configs.MathExampleConfig
    Creates the example arithmetic agent graph.
    Message - Class in graph
    Immutable message payload used for communication between topics and agents.
    Message(byte[]) - Constructor for class graph.Message
    Creates a message from raw bytes.
    Message(double) - Constructor for class graph.Message
    Creates a message from a numeric value.
    Message(String) - Constructor for class graph.Message
    Creates a message from text using the platform default byte encoding.
    MyHTTPServer - Class in server
    Default HTTPServer implementation for the project.
    MyHTTPServer(int, int) - Constructor for class server.MyHTTPServer
    Creates a server that listens on the supplied port and processes requests with a fixed number of worker threads.

    N

    name - Variable in class graph.Topic
    The externally visible topic name.
    Node - Class in configs
    Represents a single node in the rendered runtime graph.
    Node(String) - Constructor for class configs.Node
    Creates a node whose internal and display names are the same.
    Node(String, String, Node.Kind) - Constructor for class configs.Node
    Creates a node with explicit internal name, display name, and kind.
    Node.Kind - Enum Class in configs
    Identifies the semantic type of a graph node.

    P

    ParallelAgent - Class in graph
    Wraps another Agent and processes callbacks on a dedicated worker thread.
    ParallelAgent(Agent, int) - Constructor for class graph.ParallelAgent
    Creates a parallel wrapper around an existing agent.
    parseRequest(BufferedReader) - Static method in class server.RequestParser
    Parses an HTTP request from a buffered character stream.
    PlusAgent - Class in configs
    Sample agent that sums the latest values from two input topics and publishes the result to its configured output topic.
    PlusAgent(String[], String[]) - Constructor for class configs.PlusAgent
    Creates a plus agent and subscribes it to its two input topics.
    publish(Message) - Method in class graph.Topic
    Publishes a message to this topic, stores it as the latest value, and notifies all subscribed agents.

    R

    removePublisher(Agent) - Method in class graph.Topic
    Removes an agent from the list of topic publishers.
    removeServlet(String, String) - Method in interface server.HTTPServer
    Removes a previously registered servlet mapping.
    removeServlet(String, String) - Method in class server.MyHTTPServer
    Removes a servlet mapping for a specific HTTP method and URI prefix.
    RequestInfo(String, String, String[], Map<String, String>, Map<String, String>, byte[]) - Constructor for class server.RequestParser.RequestInfo
    Creates a new parsed request snapshot.
    RequestParser - Class in server
    Parses raw HTTP requests into a reusable structured representation.
    RequestParser() - Constructor for class server.RequestParser
    Creates a request parser instance.
    RequestParser.RequestInfo - Class in server
    Immutable value object that stores the parsed details of a single HTTP request.
    reset() - Method in class configs.BinOpAgent
    Resets both cached input values to zero.
    reset() - Method in class configs.IncAgent
    Resets the agent.
    reset() - Method in class configs.PlusAgent
    Resets the cached numeric inputs to zero.
    reset() - Method in interface graph.Agent
    Resets the internal state of the agent.
    reset() - Method in class graph.BinOpAgent
    Resets both cached input values to zero.
    reset() - Method in class graph.ParallelAgent
    Resets the wrapped agent.
    run() - Method in class server.MyHTTPServer
    Opens the server socket and continuously accepts client connections until the server is closed.

    S

    server - package server
     
    Servlet - Interface in servlets
    Defines the minimal servlet contract used by the project's HTTP server.
    servlets - package servlets
     
    setConfFile(String) - Method in class configs.GenericConfig
    Sets the path to the configuration file that should be loaded.
    setDisplayName(String) - Method in class configs.Node
    Updates the display label for the node.
    setEdges(List<Node>) - Method in class configs.Node
    Replaces the outgoing edges of this node.
    setGraph(Graph) - Static method in class servlets.GraphState
    Replaces the currently stored graph snapshot.
    setKind(Node.Kind) - Method in class configs.Node
    Updates the node kind.
    setLastMessage(Message) - Method in class graph.Topic
    Updates the stored latest message for this topic without notifying subscribers.
    setMessage(Message) - Method in class configs.Node
    Associates a message with this node.
    setName(String) - Method in class configs.Node
    Updates the internal node name.
    start() - Method in interface server.HTTPServer
    Starts the server so it can begin accepting client requests.
    subscribe(Agent) - Method in class graph.Topic
    Subscribes an agent to this topic so it will receive future publications.

    T

    Topic - Class in graph
    Represents a named message channel in the publish/subscribe graph.
    TOPIC - Enum constant in enum class configs.Node.Kind
    A topic node in the runtime graph.
    TopicDisplayer - Class in servlets
    Displays the current set of topics and their latest published values as an HTML table.
    TopicDisplayer() - Constructor for class servlets.TopicDisplayer
    Creates a topic display servlet.
    TopicManagerSingleton - Class in graph
    Provides global access to the project's shared topic registry.
    TopicManagerSingleton() - Constructor for class graph.TopicManagerSingleton
    Creates access to the singleton topic manager.
    TopicManagerSingleton.TopicManager - Class in graph
    Stores and manages all topics known to the running application.

    U

    unsubscribe(Agent) - Method in class graph.Topic
    Removes a subscribed agent from this topic.

    V

    valueOf(String) - Static method in enum class configs.Node.Kind
    Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name.
    values() - Static method in enum class configs.Node.Kind
    Returns an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared.
    views - package views
